node.statement: (Hypotheses verification). Verify that the hypotheses of Nodes 1.1 and 1.2 are satisfied in the setting of the main theorem. Specifically: (i) A is a unital *-algebra and φ ∈ S(A) is a state, so the GNS construction applies and the face-commutant correspondence (Node 1.1) holds. (ii) K = S(A) is a compact convex set (by Banach-Alaoglu), and the functionals f_j(ψ) = ψ(a_j) are continuous affine on S(A) (since a_j ∈ A^{sa} are bounded), so the Weis-Shirokov theorem (Node 1.2) applies with K = S(A) and m constraints.
